subcodes.first_line: O Leaf of the Divine Lote-Tree! Strive thou with all thy might, for this is the Day of endeavor and striving, that thou mayest learn from the wondrous melodies of the Lote-Tree [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه سدره الهیه جهد نما که یوم جهد و سعیست تا از الحان بدیعه سدره بیاموزی مسک
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @call to action, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @praise and encouragement
